latestPosts.caption:
calling all hawaii foodies 👀🍶🍣

Irasshai is back on Friday, April 3rd at the Japanese Cultural Center with unlimited tastings of Japanese street-food inspired dishes + drinks, and live entertainment 🇯🇵🍜

🎟 Use code townietay for $15 off General Admission tickets 💫

taggedUsers.full_name: Japanese Cultural Center of Hawaiʻi (JCCH) • Oʻahu Nonprofit

latestPosts.caption:
officially hawaii homeowners 🏡🔑

We are so excited to share that we our first time homeowners here on Oahu!! Thank you to my incredible other half for making this dream of ours a reality 🥹 I can’t wait to start this journey of home ownership together. Blessed is an understatement 💛

P.S. Yes, we are still planning our summer 2026 wedding! Wish us luck lol 😆

latestPosts.caption:
ungatekeeping this mccully gem 🍰

Sachi Sweets specializes in not-too-sweet treats like their light and fluffy soufflé cheesecakes. I love bringing these to parties—they’re always a hit!

You can also try them at Irasshai on April 3rd, a dine-around event featuring street food–inspired tastings from some of your favorite local eateries.

🎟️ Use my code townietay for $15 off your Irasshai tickets!

taggedUsers.full_name: Japanese Cultural Center of Hawaiʻi (JCCH) • Oʻahu Nonprofit

latestPosts.caption:
such a cute kakaako gem 🪑🖼️☕️

I heard there was a cool coffee shop tucked away in a furniture shop, so I went to check it out for myself! @cafevntg is definitely a cool stop for your next cafe hopping adventure 💫

💌 mahalo @cafevntg for having me 💛

musicInfo.song_name: 360 (Arr. For Cello Obligato and String Quartet)

$3 draft sapporo beer & sake 🤯🍻

Have you visited this Ala Moana gem? I love coming to this cozy ramen shop for their shoyu ramen and bites sized gyoza 🤤🍜

latestPosts.caption:
come play a hole with us ⛳️ (mic’d up 🫣)

We had another great round at the beautiful @golfwaikele 🥳 I definitely need to work on my putting, but I’ll take bogey golf any day! 

💌 mahalo @golfwaikele for having us!! #hawaiigolf

have you been to this kalihi gem? 🥩🍻

I definitely have been sleeping on Kalihi eateries!! So glad we decided to check out @thebreakroom808 for some late night bites ☺️

taggedUsers.full_name: Cat Café MOFF Ala Moana Center

latestPosts.caption:
eeep!! new @nicetocuhawaii in kahala 🇰🇷🌺

CU just opened their second location in Hawaii at Kahala Corner (next to Kahala Mall) 🥳 This popular chain from Korean is known for their trendy street food, DIY iced drinks, private label snacks, and ramen bar 🍜 

💌 mahalo @nicetocuhawaii for having me!!

last minute valentine’s date ideas 💌

Our shared love language is quality time, and we love trying out new things together! Here are seven cool & unique date ideas in Hawaii 🌈 
🐝 @hihoneyfarm 
🐐 @alohagoatyoga 
🧑🏻‍🍳 @islandbakingstudio 
⛳️ @koolinagolf 
🧖‍♀️ @wailanadayspa 
⛵️ @oceanandyouhawaii 
🍷 @oenowinemaking

join us on our search for our new home 🥹🏡

Can’t wait to enter this next chapter as homeowners! I’ll be sharing my experience on purchasing a home in Hawaii as locals and first-time homebuyers. 

💌 slide into @shan.shiro DMs if you are interested in starting your own home search 🤭
I get to marry the man of my dreams 🥹💍!! Love you more @shan.shiro 💛

valentines nails loading… 💌💘

Shout out to my girls at @originail_hnl for always keeping my nails so cute 🥰 Love seeing everyone’s adorable nails for Valentine’s Day!

my forever valentine 🥹⛳️

Sending love to you all this Valentine’s Day 💝 We enjoyed a round of golf today in our matching “Cherreh” blossom polos from @oahugolfapparel 🌸🌸 Stay tuned for this new drop just in time for Spring 👀

💌 mahalo @oahugolfapparel !! We love our new fits 🥰

fun & affordable activity in west oahu 🛼🪩

My girls & I had so much fun checking out @official_kiha_public_skate for the first time! I honestly had no idea that this Kapolei gem existed 😆

🎀 girl dinner 👯‍♀️

So happy I finally got to check out this popular Kaimuki Speakeasy 🤍 Vintage Books is now offering a $50 “girl dinner which is a great idea for your Galentine’s festivities 🍸

💌 mahalo @vintagebookshawaii for having us!!

a new restaurant actually worth checking out 🎣🍣

I heard there was a new seafood fusion concept at the former Nami Kaze location and had to check it out! @thirtyeighthi had some big shoes to fill, and I was quite impressed by the high quality seafood dishes 🤤 This is definitely the spot to check out in coming months!

💌 mahalo @chancelork @thirtyeighthi for hosting us!

our go-to pau hana spot 🍻🍕

Have you been to this popular beer garden in Kakaako? We went to check out @alohabeerco updated menu and love their new items like the Ahi Saku Tataki, Mushroom Rockefeller and Kalbi Bowls. Love to see more local bites at this popular brewery! 🍣

💌 mahalo @alohabeerco @candiceandpackard for having us!!

my first time playing bar golf 🍻🏌🏻‍♀️

We had so much fun playing bar golf with our friends at @crossfitoahufamily ! Such a fun way to bar hop in Kakaako 🥳

have you been to this kalihi gem? 🥩🍻

I definitely have been sleeping on Kalihi eateries!! So glad we decided to check out @thebreakroom808 for some late night bites ☺️

calling all hawaii foodies 👀🍶🍣

Irasshai is back on Friday, April 3rd at the Japanese Cultural Center with unlimited tastings of Japanese street-food inspired dishes + drinks, and live entertainment 🇯🇵🍜

🎟 Use code townietay for $15 off General Admission tickets 💫

there’s a new wellness studio in town 👀

There are quite a few studios popping up in Oahu, and this is definitely one to keep on your radar! @lavawellness offers contrast therapy, somadome, hyperbaric chamber, and more 💫
such a cute activity in honolulu 🍵🍰  #matchalover
epoxy resin workshop in kapolei 🎨👩🏻‍🎨 #hawaiilife
I now have a mentaiko egg yolk onigiri addiction 😮‍💨 #hawaiieats
join us on our hawaii home search 🏡 #firsttimehomebuyer
sneak peek at the new CU location in kahala 🇰🇷🫰 #hawaiifoodie
drooling over this Thai street food spot in Chinatown 😍🇹🇭
not quite ready to leave our New Zealand engagement moon 😩💛
have you been to this iconic Hawai’i steakhouse? #hawaiifood #waikiki
some much needed R&R 🧖‍♀️😌 #hawaiilife #dateideas
stylish date night spot in kakaako 🥩🍷 #hawaiifood
my childhood self is screaming 💞 hello kitty x aloha collection collab #haul
can I take one home?? 🥹🐐 #goatyoga #hawaiilife
where to get your bossam fix in hawaii 🐷 #hawaiifoodie
for the girls 🧘🏻‍♀️🍵🎀 #pilatesprincess #hawaiilife
korean bakery tucked away in downtown honoulu 🙂‍↔️🍰 #hawaiifood #sweettreats
these bagel sandwiches live rent free in my mind 🥯🤤 #hawaiifood #kakaako
had to go outside & touch grass 🌱🌳 #japantravel #japancountryside #yamaguchi
Do not overlook the foodie scene on Kauai! Rounding up some of my favorite casual eateries on the Garden Isle 🌺 #kauai #hawaiifood
never beating the “obsessed with her bf” allegations 😚 #couples #justagirl
take all of my money 🤧🌺 fighting eel activewear coming soon!!

posts.text:
calling all hawaii foodies 👀🍶🍣

Irasshai is back on Friday, April 3rd at the Japanese Cultural Center with unlimited tastings of Japanese street-food inspired dishes + drinks, and live entertainment 🇯🇵🍜

🎟 Use code townietay for $15 off General Admission tickets 💫

officially hawaii homeowners 🏡🔑

We are so excited to share that we our first time homeowners here on Oahu!! Thank you to my incredible other half for making this dream of ours a reality 🥹 I can’t wait to start this journey of home ownership together. Blessed is an understatement 💛

P.S. Yes, we are still planning our summer 2026 wedding! Wish us luck lol 😆

ungatekeeping this mccully gem 🍰

Sachi Sweets specializes in not-too-sweet treats like their light and fluffy soufflé cheesecakes. I love bringing these to parties—they’re always a hit!

You can also try them at Irasshai on April 3rd, a dine-around event featuring street food–inspired tastings from some of your favorite local eateries.

🎟️ Use my code townietay for $15 off your Irasshai tickets!

such a cute kakaako gem 🪑🖼️☕️

I heard there was a cool coffee shop tucked away in a furniture shop, so I went to check it out for myself! @cafevntg is definitely a cool stop for your next cafe hopping adventure 💫

💌 mahalo @cafevntg for having me 💛

$3 draft sapporo beer & sake 🤯🍻

Have you visited this Ala Moana gem? I love coming to this cozy ramen shop for their shoyu ramen and bites sized gyoza 🤤🍜

come play a hole with us ⛳️ (mic’d up 🫣)

We had another great round at the beautiful @golfwaikele 🥳 I definitely need to work on my putting, but I’ll take bogey golf any day! 

💌 mahalo @golfwaikele for having us!! #hawaiigolf

have you been to this kalihi gem? 🥩🍻

I definitely have been sleeping on Kalihi eateries!! So glad we decided to check out @thebreakroom808 for some late night bites ☺️

eeep!! new @nicetocuhawaii in kahala 🇰🇷🌺

CU just opened their second location in Hawaii at Kahala Corner (next to Kahala Mall) 🥳 This popular chain from Korean is known for their trendy street food, DIY iced drinks, private label snacks, and ramen bar 🍜 

💌 mahalo @nicetocuhawaii for having me!!

there’s a new wellness studio in town 👀

There are quite a few studios popping up in Oahu, and this is definitely one to keep on your radar! @lavawellness offers contrast therapy, somadome, hyperbaric chamber, and more 💫
